gbp_search: Moonstone Pressure Washing Lithia Springs GA

business_context.owner: Alonzo Lara Cabrera Sr. (father) and Alonso Jr. (son)
business_context.location: Lithia Springs, GA (service-area, based at 1044 Moonstone Court)
business_context.specialties: Soft washing (house, roof, fencing), pressure washing (driveways, patios, sidewalks), paver sealing, gutter cleaning, commercial washing. AMRA-compliant roof cleaning.
business_context.photo_notes: Their website is mostly Getty stock images (not usable) plus 1 real branded truck image. Instagram @moonstonepressurewashingllc has 40+ real work photos but is not web-scrapable. GBP photo situation unknown.

photo_count_from_gbp_estimate: 1 confirmed real photo on website (truck). Real work photos exist on Instagram but are not accessible via URL fetch.

source_urls.extraction_method: WebFetch on moonstonepressurewashing.com, excluded Getty stock images. Only truck photo is authentic to the business.
source_urls.notes: Truck image is PNG — Bruce should convert to JPEG per specs. Was used as hero in the original build and is their real branded vehicle.

hero.search_for: Existing truck image is serviceable as hero (from their website). Alternative: father-and-son team at work pressure washing, or dramatic before/after driveway shot.
hero.aspect_hint: wide landscape. Truck image is 1080x446 — works as full-width banner with gradient overlay.

gallery.search_for: Before/after transformations: house washing, driveway cleaning, roof cleaning, deck cleaning, paver sealing. Dramatic clean-up shots preferred. Try GBP first.

specs.quality_hint: JPEG quality 75-85. Convert the hero PNG to JPEG.

naming.hero: hero.jpg (REPLACE existing with this source_urls hero — same image, just needs JPEG conversion and size optimization)

fallback_strategy.if_insufficient_urls: Gallery: fall back to Unsplash contextual search. Best terms: 'pressure washing driveway before after', 'house soft washing technician', 'roof cleaning technician'. Deliver 3-6 photos. Pressure washing is the most visually-driven trade so photos matter — do not skip gallery.

acceptance_criteria: Hero shows the branded Moonstone truck (from source_urls) OR a dramatic before/after driveway
Gallery shows pressure washing work (real or authentic Unsplash), not generic exterior home stock
No Getty stock or AI-generated images
Before/after pairs are ideal where available
pilot_notes: Mini's 'service-area photo-heavy trade' pilot case. Real photos limited to 1 truck image (website is mostly Getty stock). Gallery will likely need Unsplash fallback.
